gamerule.treasureBalloonSpawnTime.descri: Time between each balloon spawn attempt (in ticks).
gamerule.treasureBalloonChestLifeTime.de: Time until dropped Balloon Chest will despawn (in ticks)
gamerule.treasureBalloonLifeTime.descrip: Time until floating Treasure Balloon will despawn (in ticks)
gamerule.treasureBalloonAnnouncement.des: Will the arrival of the balloon be announced with just wind (0), hotbar message (1), chat message (2), or public message (3)?
gamerule.treasureBalloonHeightOffset.des: How far above the player the balloon spawns (in blocks).
advancements.lost_in_transit.descr: Shoot down a balloon and collect items from its chest

item.realmrpg_balloons.balloon_clock.des: §7Displays the Balloon Spawn Timer when held.
§7Use in air to Reset Balloon Timer.
advancements.one_in_a_million.title: One In A Million
advancements.one_in_a_million.descr: Collect the loot from the legendary balloon container
gamerule.treasureBalloonMultiplayerCoold: When enabled, reduces the number of balloons spawning for a group of players.
item.realmrpg_balloons.balloon_clock.des: §7Interact with the Balloon to change its Rarity.
§7Sneak + Interact with the Balloon to change its Direction.
